title: The Crew Is Scattered
main_description: Kizaru, Kuma, and the Pacifista overwhelm the Straw Hats and scatter them across the world. The chapter mainly follows Pacifista, Whitebeard, Brook, keeping the focus on the Sabaody Archipelago storyline.
key_events: The Crew Is Scattered: Rising Conflict
